subcodes.first_line: O My Beloved! Hearken unto that which God calleth thee from this Tree which hath been raised up in truth, and sing thou that verily He is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا حبیب اسمع ما ینادیک الله فی هذه الشجره التی ارتفعت بالحق و تغن بانه انا
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God
